reviews.comment:
Son cordiales y atienden bien. Las oficinas del ACA solucionan todo. Hay que esperar un poco.

(Translated by Google)
They are friendly and provide good service. The ACA offices handle everything. You just have to wait a little while.

(Translated by Google)
Very slow service

reviews.comment:
Una sola persona para atender a toda la estación de servicio. Encima no estaba organizado y cargaba de a un surtidor. Horas para cobrarte. A las 12.30 de la noche tenía 3 autos adelante tarde 40 minutos. Un desastre

(Translated by Google)
One person to serve the entire gas station. On top of that, he wasn't organized and only filled one pump at a time. It took ages to get paid. At 12:30 at night, there were three cars ahead of me and I was 40 minutes late. A disaster.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4834150439448216609/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXd2N5dlB3EAE

Es YPF, para mí, en este momento, Infinita es la mejor nafta del país, así lo demuestra el andar de mí auto. Los plateros don todos atentos.
